title: v0.7 -> v0.8
html:
v0.7 -> v0.8

AdaptixC2

New:

  • Added Targets Manager
  • Redesigned Listeners table and Listener creation dialogs
  • Reworked task and tunnel queue mechanism.
  • AxScript new functions: ids, isactive, format_size, targets_add, targets_add_list, credentials_add_list, prompt_confirm. Also added get_commands, validate_command, file_write_text (by shantanu561993)
  • AxScript new selector: selector_agents
  • AxScript new menu: add_targets, add_credentials
  • AxScript new data models: downloads, screenshots, tunnels, targets
  • AxScript new events: on_ready, on_disconnect, list, remove.
  • AxScript: added timers and intervals (by shantanu561993)
  • Client: added new custom theme Fallout3 and font VT323 (by Steve0ro)
  • Credentials Manager:
  • added ability to set a tag.
  • added ability to add or remove a list of credentials in a single request.
  • Telegram Callback: Now supports events for adding new credentials to Credentials Manager and for file download completion from remote host.

Fix:

  • Fixed unintended task termination in AxScript hook handler.
  • Fixed premature connection closure during Reverse Port Forwarding (NTLM Relay now works correctly) (by T1erno)

Beacon

New:

  • Added ProxyDLL generation for sideloading (by 3v4Si0N)

Fix:

  • Fixed bug in getuid command (by overflow0verture)

Gopher

Fix:

  • Fixed an issue where the macOS agent could fail to generate (by L0nm4r)
  • Fixed jobTerminal zombie processes (by yutianqaq)

Extension-Kit

New:

  • ldapq computers command now uses BOF Ldapsearch to obtain the list of domain computers and populates Targets Manager via AxScript handler.
  • Added Jump to menu in Targets Table.

Fix:

  • Conditional redirect_std_out_err_for_mingw for UCRT in No-Consolation BOF (by T1erno)
excerpt: v0.7 -> v0.8 AdaptixC2 New: Added Targets Manager Redesigned Listeners table and Listener creation dialogs Reworked task and tunnel queue mechanism. AxScript new functions: ids, isactive, format_si
